releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Features

- Setting to open the plugin window on different layouts, such as sidebars or the main editor instead of the left sidebar only.
- Setting to enable sound effects, configure path to SFX for task completion, counters and rewards.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/dromse/obsidian-gamified-tasks/compare/1.10.1...1.11.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# 1.9.0

## New Features

- Customization for groups was added to the settings.
- Added icons to tabs.
- A confetti effect is now displayed when a reward is purchased.
- Added daily stats to the history tab
- Show the number of tasks in a group

## Bug Fixes

- Fixed UI bugs that appeared after Obsidian 1.7.0.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/dromse/obsidian-gamified-tasks/compare/1.8.1...1.9.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# 1.8.1 Bugfix

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/dromse/obsidian-gamified-tasks/compare/1.8.0...1.8.1

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# 1.8.0

## New Features

- Added `#group` tag to group tasks [[Wiki]](https://github.com/dromse/obsidian-gamified-tasks/wiki/Getting-Started#how-to-use-groups). 
- Added option to buy multiple rewards at once.
- Added option to change counter on optional value.

## Bug Fixes

- Fixed UI bugs that appeared after Obsidian 1.7.0.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/dromse/obsidian-gamified-tasks/compare/1.7.0...1.8.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# 1.7.0

## New Features

- Added sorting by type (recurring, condition).
- Added option to save a task to daily note from Plugin UI.
- Added credit mode in settings. [How it works here.](https://github.com/dromse/obsidian-gamified-tasks/wiki/Settings#toggle-credit-mode-17)
- Added setting to activate negative values in counter for bad habits.

## Bug Fixes

- Fixed duplicated `note filter` in filters on `Tasks` tab.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/dromse/obsidian-gamified-tasks/compare/1.6.0...1.7.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# 1.6.0

## New Features

- Added sorting by type (alphabetical or numerical) and order (ascending/descending).
- Click on a reward in the Plugin UI to reveal its line in the reward file.
- New setting to change the `completedAt` marker.

## Bug Fixes

- Editing a task in Task Editor no longer resets the current goal.
- Fixed stale values in Task Editor after task updates in the Obsidian editor.
- Editing the current value in Task Editor now doesn't update the YAML property in the daily note.
- Files in the ignore list no longer cause tasks in the selected file to be ignored.

**Full Changelog**: [1.5.1...1.6.0](https://github.com/dromse/obsidian-gamified-tasks/compare/1.5.1...1.6.0)*

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# 1.5.1 Bug Fixes

- Resolved an issue where the task list wouldn't update when a "module not found" error occurred.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/dromse/obsidian-gamified-tasks/compare/1.5.0...1.5.1

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# 1.5.0

## New Features

- **Conditions**: Introduced a new feature that allows users to filter and show tasks based on customizable conditions. You can learn more about this feature in the [documentation](https://github.com/dromse/obsidian-gamified-tasks/wiki/Getting-Started#conditions-15).

## Fixed Bugs

- Fixed issues with resetting values in YAML properties for tasks with binding:
  - Simple task when toggling it.
  - Counters when resetting it.
  - Recurring tasks when resetting.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/dromse/obsidian-gamified-tasks/compare/1.4.1...1.5.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# 1.4.1 Bugfix

- Fixed lost saving of custom difficulty alias and price after reopening of obsidian.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# 1.4.0

## New Features

1. **Plugin Settings**
   - Added options to change or add new difficulty levels.
   - Added a setting to specify path for saving new task.

2. **Task Management**
   - Added a button for adding new tasks easily from Plugin UI.

3. **History**
   - Added a search feature to quickly find rows in history.

4. **Task Editing**
   - Added more fields for editing task.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# 1.3.0

- Click on a task to access a menu with options: Reveal Task, Edit Task, Change Status, and Reset Counter (if you use counter).
- Use counter without a goal, e.g., #count/0.
- View task difficulty in the task's corner.
- Bind properties to daily notes, e.g., #bind/property.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# 1.2.4

- New plugin name, description and repo (Gamified Tasks)
- Change dropdown menu on checkbox

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# 1.2.1 Hotfix

- Fix broken grind manager icon in right bar.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# 1.2.0 - Coin Depository and UI Enhancements

## New Features:

- **Coin Depository**: Now you can conveniently manage your coins within the application.
- **Clear Input Button**: Added a quick way to clear input fields for smoother user interaction.

## Enhancements:

- **Improved Task Display**: Task bodies now display the title of Markdown or Wiki link, providing better clarity and organization.
- **Task Overview**: Display number of shown tasks for better organization.
- **Setting Update**: Added a setting to disable the display of the completion date link on finishing tasks.
- **Setting UI Modification**: Changed the layout and design of the settings interface for improved usability.
- **UI Refinements**: Made several minor UI improvements for a more polished user experience.

## Post Scriptum

These updates aim to enhance usability and provide a more seamless experience.  
As always, your feedback is invaluable. Keep those suggestions coming, and let's make this plugin even better together!

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# 1.1.1 Minor fixes

- Eliminated titles from tab labels.
- Addressed issues with the counter that misbehaves on slower devices (#10).
- Resolved the problem with tags shifting during task editing in notes, when the tag `#every` is added (#12).

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# 1.1.0 - Added more filters

- Filter by tags and notes.
- Added ignoring files in settings.
- Added notification on counter increase, decrease.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# 1.0.7

- Fixed issue #11

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# 1.0.6 - Correct Reset by Local Time and UI Enhancements 

- Fixed bug with not correct resetting tasks, now `Grind Manager` use your local time instead of ISO time.
- Say goodbye to broken UI on phones; `Grind Manager` interface now adapts and responds flawlessly across all devices.
- Minor bug fixes and refactoring.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# 1.0.5 - Live Reloading

- Added live reloading list of tasks, rewards or history on vault modification.
- Resolved issues with the old historical state, which were causing problems on resetting recurring tasks properly.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]

- fixed `React is not defined`.
- fixed immediate counter resets when history is empty.
- refactored: moved 'tasks' key in sessionStorage to 'grind-manager__tasks'.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# 1.0.0 - Initial release

## Implemented

- Parsing tasks from vault + Middlewares
- Functional for earning and spending coins
- Work with counters
- Recurrence
- Changing statuses for tasks
- Default settings in Obsidian Settings Tab
